arts.ttl: Fati passed fit by Barca ahead of Monaco clash
arts.sum: Fati has a genuine chance to try and get his Barcelona career back on track this season under Flick. His return will be a boost for Flick who is without several key players due to injury and saw Dani Olmo and Fermin Lopez join his injured list this week.
